caption: A news broadcast features a man with a mustache wearing a white shirt and a dark grey vest with an "ANI" logo on it. He is positioned inside a vehicle, speaking while gesturing with his right hand. To his left is a portrait of an older man with glasses and white hair, identified by the text "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार". To the right, smaller portraits of two other men are labeled "मंत्री विजेन्द्र यादव" and "श्रवण कुमार". A red banner at the top reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". A large yellow and red banner at the bottom displays "BREAKING NEWS" and "10:04 PM", alongside a small logo for "MAHAGOW". As the scene progresses, the man in the vest continues to speak, moving his hand from a slight open-palm gesture to touching his forehead with his fingertips. The background elements, including the portraits and text banners, remain static across the frames.
